name: Street Dribble
author: Poki
description: Street Dribble is a soccer platformer game, where you dribble your way through the world! You have the power to shoot your football and change the scenery around you. What happens if you kick that bucket of paint down? Or what if you hit those bullies? Fill your chaos meter to unlock a super shot. There's a lot to discover in this game. Can you make it to the end of the level to battle it out with the final boss? How to play Street Dribble? Use W, spacebar or up arrow to jump, use D or right arrow to shoot the ball. Who created Street Dribble? Street Dribble is created by Xansr. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Street Dribble for free? You can play Street Dribble for free on Poki. Can I play Street Dribble on mobile devices and desktop? Street Dribble can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
